description: Citrus reticulata tea contains various bioactive constituents such as limonoids, flavonoids, and alkaloids that have been found to have antidepressant properties, helping to alleviate symptoms of depression. The properties of this herbal tea include its ability to modulate neurotransmitters, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation, all of which can contribute to improved mood and reduced symptoms of depression.
